bird.name: 姬鸨
bird.summary: 姬鸨 （ Sypheotides indicus ）是鸨科中体型最小的物種 。它是印度次大陆的特有种，栖息于高草丛生地带，以雄性在雨季期间独特的跳跃式求偶行为闻名。夏季主要分布于印度西北部及中部，冬季则扩散至更广阔区域。目前该物种濒危程度极高，該物種曾分佈在巴基斯坦境內，但巴基…

relations.subject: 姬鸨
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the Indian Subcontinent where it is found in tall grasslands and is best known for the leaping breeding displays made by the males during the monsoon season
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 姬鸨
relations.evidence: Historic records exist from the Makran coast of Balochistan province in Pakistan. A record from Burma has been questioned. The species is said to move in response to rainfall and their presence at locations can be erratic, with sudden large numbers in some seasons. About 500 males in Gujarat were ringed and nearly 18 were recovered, most of them within about of their ringing sites. The preferred habitat is grasslands but it sometimes occurs in fields such as those of cotton and lentils. Breeding areas are today restricted mainly to Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh, some areas in southern Nepal and parts of Andhra Pradesh.{{cite journal|author1=Sankaran, Ravi |author2=Rahmani, AR |author3=Ganguli-Lachungpa, U |year=1992| title= The distribution and status of the Lesser Florican Sypheotides indica (J.F

relations.subject: 姬鸨
relations.evidence: It is threatened both by hunting and habitat degradation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
